message:
feat: Phase 5 - LanceQL Integration

Complete the data layer with real vector DB queries:
- build.zig.zon: Add lanceql as local path dependency
- build.zig: Import lanceql module into executable
- lanceql.zig: Replace placeholder with real implementation
  - Load Lance files directly into memory
  - Parse table schema and column names
  - Read typed column data (int64, float64)
  - Return query results with table info and sample data

Query format:
  <QUERY>sales.lance: SELECT * FROM data WHERE id > 10</QUERY>
